purpose: Harden the Batch134 UI/features ported from the kế hoạch file so they do not look like production backend actions.
notProductionClaims: weekly schedule data remains UI sample until account-backed storage is implemented
resource save/report actions are source-level notices until backend/audit log exists
community moderation actions do not public/takedown real resources without backend audit
release gate must read /api/runtime/public-rollout-readiness when available

actionContracts.allowedNow: add safe resource metadata into teacher note for eligible samples
show decision notice and block high-risk approval
display runtime public-rollout readiness API status
